title: Use UnparsedInstance.Manifest instead of ImageSource.GetManifest
body:
... to validate that the manifests match expected digests, if any.
    
Do this everywhere, even where we read local storage which is mostly trusted, because it is cheap enough and being consistent makes it less likely for the code to be copied into other contexts where the sources are not trusted.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```release-note
None
```
